ActionButtons.description:
ActionButtons - Pre-built action button group for games

Provides 1-2 action buttons (jump, shoot, etc.) with dual input support.
Shows keyboard shortcuts on hover when keyboardHints prop is provided.
Labels can be text, icons, or any React node.

ComboIndicator.description:
Shows combo multiplier with pulse animation

Displays "2x COMBO!", "3x COMBO!", etc. with a pulse effect when the
combo increases. Automatically hides when combo is 0.

CountdownAnimation.description:
Full-screen countdown animation (3... 2... 1... GO!)

Displays a full-screen overlay with animated countdown.
Auto-removes from DOM when complete.

DirectionalPad.description:
DirectionalPad - Pre-built directional control component

Provides arrow buttons for directional movement in games.
Automatically handles both touch and mouse input.
Shows keyboard shortcuts on hover when keyboardHints prop is provided.

FloatingText.description:
Floating text component

Renders floating score popups from useScorePopup hook.
Shows "+100" or "-50" style text that floats up and fades out.

ParticleEmitter.description:
Particle emitter component

Renders particles from useParticles hook.
Each particle is rendered as a colored circle that moves and fades out.

ScreenShakeContainer.description:
Screen shake container component

Wraps game content and applies shake transform from useScreenShake hook.
Only applies transform when isShaking is true.

GameBoard.description:
GameBoard - Container for game content and controls

Creates a two-section layout within a tab:
- Game area (fills available space)
- Controls section (fixed at bottom)

Usage:
```tsx
<GameBoard controls={<YourControls />}>
<YourGameCanvas />
</GameBoard>
```

GameMiniLayout.description:
GameMiniLayout - Layout for game-based mini apps

Features:
- Static header (not floating, part of layout flow)
- Full-height layout (no scrolling)
- Built-in Tabs from

BuffIcon.description:
Buff icon component

Displays buff/debuff icons with progress ring showing time remaining.
Color-coded: green for positive buffs, red for negative debuffs.

InventoryGrid.description:
Inventory grid component

Visual inventory display with grid layout and custom item rendering.
Supports item click handling.

PowerUpIndicator.description:
Power-up indicator component

Displays active power-ups with circular progress ring showing time remaining.
Stacks horizontally.

ProgressBar.description:
Linear progress bar with optional percentage label

Displays progress as a percentage of max value with smooth transitions.
Supports striped and animated variants.

ProgressTimer.description:
Circular or linear progress indicator with time display

Combines visual progress with formatted time display.
Use with useCountdown or useStopwatch hooks.

ScoreDisplay.description:
Animated score counter with smooth count-up animation

Animates from the previous value to the new value using an ease-out
cubic easing function. Pure JavaScript animation with no dependencies.

Timer.description:
Formatted time display component

Displays time in various formats. This is a presentation component
(doesn't manage state - just displays the provided milliseconds).
Use with useCountdown or useStopwatch hooks.

ControlsHelper.description:
Keyboard/touch control overlay component

Shows list of keyboard/touch controls in a semi-transparent overlay.
Formatted like "Arrow Keys - Move player".

TutorialOverlay.description:
Tutorial overlay component

Full-screen tutorial UI with step counter, navigation, and element highlighting.
Darkens screen except highlighted element, shows tooltip with instructions.

useFlashEffect.description:
Full-screen flash effect hook

Creates full-screen color flash for damage, power-ups, or transitions.
Fades in quickly, then fades out slowly.

useParticles.description:
Particle emitter hook for visual effects

Creates particles for confetti, explosions, sparkles, etc.
Particles move based on velocity and gravity, fading out over time.

usePulse.description:
Pulse/scale animation utility for UI elements

Pulses element when trigger value changes.
Animates scale from 1.0 → 1.2 → 1.0 over ~300ms.

useScorePopup.description:
Floating score popup hook

Creates floating "+100" style text that fades up and disappears.
Automatically cleans up after animation completes (~1000ms).

useScreenShake.description:
Screen shake effect for impact feedback (camera/viewport shake)

Generates randomized X/Y offset values that decay over time, creating a camera shake
effect for high-impact moments. Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60 FPS animation.
Intensity controls shake magnitude (1-10 range, auto-clamped). Duration specifies
shake length in milliseconds. Offsets decay linearly to zero.

## Implementation Pattern
Apply offset to game container transform. Use ScreenShakeContainer component
for pre-built integration with proper styling.

## Performance
Uses single requestAnimationFrame loop. Automatically cleans up on unmount.
Multiple shake calls override previous shake (doesn't stack).

useGameLoop.description:
Provides a 60 FPS game loop for frame-based games

Calls the callback function at a specified frame rate (default 60 FPS).
Automatically pauses when the game is paused via `useGamePaused()`.
Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth, browser-optimized timing.

useInitializeGame.description:
Initialize game configuration and action handlers

This hook combines game config initialization and action handler setup.
Call this once at the top level of your game component.

gameConfigAtom.description:
Global game configuration atom
Shared state that game hooks (like useScore) need to read

useBuffs.description:
Temporary stat buffs/debuffs hook (global)

Tracks temporary stat modifiers with automatic expiration.
Calculates combined multipliers for stacking buffs.
State is shared globally across all components that use this hook.

useInventory.description:
Simple inventory system hook (global)

Stores collected items with deduplication by ID.
State is shared globally across all components that use this hook.

usePowerUps.description:
Power-up management hook (global)

Manages active power-ups with duration timers.
Auto-deactivates when timer expires.
State is shared globally across all components that use this hook.

useTutorial.description:
Multi-step tutorial system hook

Manages tutorial flow with navigation, progress tracking, and completion callbacks.

useCombo.description:
Combo multiplier system for consecutive actions (global)

Tracks consecutive actions and builds a multiplier. Auto-resets if no action
occurs within the specified time window. State is shared globally across all
components that use this hook.

## Configuration
- `setMaxComboTime(ms)` - Set timeout window (default: 1000ms)
- `setMultiplierFn(fn)` - Customize multiplier calculation (default: linear)

## Multiplier Modes
- **Linear**: `(combo) => Math.max(1, combo)` - Multiplier equals combo count
- **Tiered**: Jumps at thresholds (e.g., 1x → 2x

useCountdown.description:
Countdown timer that counts down from a specified duration (global)

Automatically pauses when the game is paused via `useGamePaused()`.
Calls onComplete callback when timer reaches 0.
Must call start() to begin countdown (doesn't auto-start).
Uses Jotai atoms for global state.

useActiveGameActions.description:
Get the currently active game actions

Returns a Set of GameAction keys that are currently pressed.
Useful for visual feedback like highlighting active buttons.

useSetActiveGameActions.description:
Set the active game actions

Updates which keys/buttons are currently pressed.
Typically used internally by useInitializeGame.

useGameControlsEnabled.description:
Check if game controls are enabled

Returns whether keyboard and touch controls are currently active.
When false, useInitializeGame will not respond to input.

useSetGameControlsEnabled.description:
Enable or disable game controls

Use this to disable controls during animations, cutscenes, or loading.
Automatically integrates with useInitializeGame.

useGamePaused.description:
Check if game is paused

Returns the current pause state of the game.

useSetGamePaused.description:
Set game pause state

Pause or resume the game. This is just state management - you need to
implement the actual pause logic (stopping game loop, etc).

useGameOver.description:
Check if game is over

Returns whether the game has ended (win or lose).

useSetGameOver.description:
Set game over state

Mark the game as finished. Useful for triggering game over UI,
disabling controls, showing scores, etc.

useGameLoading.description:
Check if game is loading

Returns whether the game is in a loading state.

useSetGameLoading.description:
Set game loading state

Indicate loading status for assets, level data, etc.

useGameActionHandlers.description:
Get game action handlers

Returns the globally stored handlers created by useInitializeGame.
Use this in child components to access button/key handlers.

useSetGameActionHandlers.description:
Set game action handlers

Store handlers globally. This is used internally by useInitializeGame.
You should NOT need to call this directly in your game code.

useScore.description:
Global score management hook using Jotai atoms

Manages score state globally with helper functions to manipulate the score.
Score is shared across all components that use this hook.
Reads allowNegativeScore config from gameConfigAtom (set via useInitializeGame).

useStopwatch.description:
Stopwatch timer that counts up from 0 (global)

Automatically pauses when the game is paused via `useGamePaused()`.
Must call start() to begin counting (doesn't auto-start).
Uses Jotai atoms for global state.

useStreak.description:
Win streak tracking hook (global)

Tracks current win streak and best streak ever achieved using Jotai atoms.
Wins increment the streak, losses reset it to 0.

randomInt.description:
Random number utilities for games

Pure functions for generating random values, picking from arrays,
shuffling, and weighted random selection.

shuffle.description:
Shuffle array (Fisher-Yates algorithm)
Returns new array, doesn't modify original

clamp.description:
Common game math utilities

Pure functions for clamping, interpolation, distance calculation,
and angle conversions.

lerp.description: Linear interpolation between start and end
